home.title: My Stories
home.subtitle: Record your life stories and preserve precious memories
home.topicChildhoodDesc: Share your most unforgettable childhood memories
home.topicEducationDesc: Tell your learning experiences and growth stories
home.topicCareerDesc: Record important moments in your career
home.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this story?

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure AI model and app preferences
settings.dataManagementDesc: Your story data is stored locally. Click the button below to export all story data.

stories.title: Story Management
stories.subtitle: View, edit and export all your stories
stories.noStoriesYet: No stories yet, start recording your first story!

storyDetail.continueStoryDesc: If you want to continue improving this story, you can chat with AI.
storyDetail.emptyContent: Story content is empty. You can click "Edit" to add content manually, or return to chat with AI.
storyDetail.confirmDeleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this story? This action cannot be undone.
storyDetail.storyGeneratedDesc: AI has generated the story content based on your conversation. You can view the full story and make edits.

chat.title: Story Chat
chat.storyGeneratedDesc: AI has generated the story content based on your conversation. You can view the full story and make edits.
chat.voiceNotSupported: Your browser does not support voice recognition
chat.startJourneyDesc: Click the input box below to start chatting with AI and let it guide you through your life stories.
